gaps.problem: Button variants in app code include 'outline' but DS Button does not support it
gaps.impact: Build breaks and inconsistent visual semantics

gaps.problem: FormField does not bind label to control
gaps.impact: WCAG label association violations and test fragility

gaps.problem: DataTable lacks caption/scope/aria-sort and keyboard row activation contract
gaps.impact: Poor keyboard and screen-reader usability for data-heavy ERP screens

gaps.problem: No standardized mobile pattern for dense tables and action toolbars
Modal id and focus handling are not robust for multiple dialogs
gaps.impact: Potential SR ambiguity and focus leakage

gaps.problem: Loading/empty/error/success states vary by module with ad-hoc copy and visuals
evidence: modules/* with custom placeholders and mock fallbacks
gaps.impact: Inconsistent enterprise feel and reduced trust

gaps.problem: Density toggle exists but no global preference persistence
i18n layer exists but components/pages use hardcoded strings
gaps.impact: Localization cannot scale to multi-language enterprise rollouts

gaps.problem: Route strings are duplicated across modules and diverge from router
gaps.impact: Dead links and regressions during module expansion

gaps.problem: No component-level visual and behavior regression guardrail
gaps.impact: Design system drift reaches production unnoticed
